_publications._publicationTitle: Anti-cancer agent 3-bromopyruvate reduces growth of MPNST and inhibits metabolic pathways in a representative in-vitro model.

_contextSnippet: NADH dehydrogenase activity in untreated B8y cells was higher compared to controls... differences indicating that PA28 overexpression is associated with a higher enzyme activity and less sensitivity to treatment
details: PA28γ overexpressing cells showed higher NADH dehydrogenase activity and less sensitivity to 3-BrPA treatment compared to controls
